rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JEANNE FRENCH
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to May 8, 2013. Although the FTB letter states no funds are currently due, it explicitily reserves the right to file a claim within the statutory limits, so this estate cannot be closed for 60 days. The fee issue will require an appearance for the Court to determine whether the fees should be paid as requested.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE SLAVOJ FAMILY TRUSTM DATED AUGUST 4, 1994 AS AMEND TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Appointment Of Successor Trustee; For Order Setting Bond; An For Order Modifying Trust Provisions Related To Trustee Fee
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The Court to determine whether to appoint Petitioner as successor Trustee and to approve the modification re fees, in particular, the 1% fee for "ordinary" services and additional fees for "extraordinary" services. No additional hearing notes will be sent.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE LICILLE MARIA EALOM TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Confirming Successor Trustee And Trust Assets.
rulings.Rulings: Continued to April 10, 2013 for consideration of declaration filed March 25, 2013, related to the ex parte petition filed to dispense with notice. The ex parte notice issue must be resolved before the petition can be heard and the filing of this declaration on March 25, 2013 does not give the court sufficient time to consider the ex parte petition prior to the current hearing date for the underlying petition of March 27, 2013.
